mapper.sql: limit_id, customer_id, currency, credit_limit_amount, used_amount, available_amount, status, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_credit_limit ORDER BY customer_id, currency
SELECT FROM fx_credit_limit WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY currency
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_credit_limit (customer_id, currency, credit_limit_amount, used_amount, available_amount, status, updated_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{currency}, #{creditLimitAmount}, #{usedAmount}, #{availableAmount}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_credit_limit SET customer_id = #{customerId}, currency = #{currency}, credit_limit_amount = #{creditLimitAmount}, used_amount = #{usedAmount}, available_amount = #{availableAmount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE limit_id = #{limitId}
